normalized_title: City of Fremantle Local Planning Policy 3.1 - Fremantle City Centre & Northern Gateway
scope_summary: Provides built form and design guidance for land within the Fremantle City Centre (Precinct 2) and Northern Gateway (Precincts 1 and 3) as mapped in Figure 1, read in conjunction with LPS4 Schedule 7 Local Planning Areas 1 and 2. Sets precinct vision and desired character statements, public realm provisions for primary/secondary streets and off-street pedestrian routes, view and legibility requirements, criteria for discretionary additional building height (including 5 Star Green Star ESD and public pedestrian links), and Precinct 3-specific setback, fencing and landscaping controls. Includes an appendix documenting precinct history and character.

quality_flags: Figures 1-5 (policy area, public realm, views/landmarks, discretionary-height sites, Precinct 3 controls) are maps/diagrams with no extractable text; several provisions depend on these figures and cannot be applied spatially from text alone
Appendix labels two different character areas both as 'Area E' (contemporary influence and Gold Boom mixed use influence) - apparent labelling error in the source document
Duplicate figure caption 'Figure 12 / Figure 18: Precinct 2 Character Areas' in the appendix
